text:
Once upon a time in a small sleepy town named Willow Creek, there lived a boy named Toby. Toby dreams of being an astronaut. One day, he climbs up his treehouse tower and sees something strange out in space. Stars and planets look brighter. Toby wonders what it feels like. Suddenly, a shooting star flies past. Toby imagines floating among galaxies.

One day, an alien spaceship lands right outside Willow Creek Elementary School. Three aliens emerge, curious about earthly things. One makes gooey sounds. One wears shiny leather boots. One carries an enormous feather duster.

Toby hides behind a bush. They watch him. One nods knowingly. That evening, Toby draws pictures of astronauts and planets. Mister Jenkins finds them.

"What you draw there are pretty!" he says.

Later Toby dreams about talking with astronauts. Someday he'll find out.

The aliens decide to stay secretly. They watch Toby draw. Toby draws spaceships. Toby smiles.

They watch fireworks outside one night. Toby
